treatment_information.dosage_or_details: 30 English sounds divided into 3 sets, 10 phonemes per set, 1-2 hours per session, approximately one session per week
treatment_information.treatment_response: Both participants learned all three training sets of phoneme-grapheme associations and reached criterion in all of them in fewer sessions. WCR showed generalization to untrained tasks and maintained gains at 6-month follow-up. FSE showed improvement but could not be tested long-term due to cognitive decline.

treatment_timeline.event: Baseline evaluation before each therapy session
Training of phoneme-grapheme associations in 3 sets
Follow-up assessment for WCR at 6 months post-therapy

patient_outcome.final_status: WCR: Improved spelling and maintained gains at 6-month follow-up. FSE: Showed improvement but could not be tested long-term due to cognitive decline.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: WCR had a 6-month follow-up session. FSE could not be tested due to cognitive decline.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: WCR: Good maintenance of learned phoneme-grapheme conversion. FSE: Not specified due to inability to test long-term.
patient_outcome.recovery_timeline: WCR completed training in 25 sessions. FSE completed training in 11 sessions.
